examples.title: E-Learning Course Narrator
examples.description: Upload course content, AI structures into audio modules with pacing cues and quiz prompts, TTS narrates each module, stores in Cloud Storage with a JSON manifest.

examples.title: Emergency Mass Notification System
examples.description: Emergency Mass Notification System - SMS + voice calls with delivery tracking and escalation.

examples.title: Fraud Alert & Verification
examples.description: Suspicious transaction triggers voice call to customer, verifies via DTMF, blocks or approves in real-time. Fraud team reviews edge cases via Slack.

examples.title: Global Lead Response Engine
examples.description: Global Lead Response Engine - multi-language AI qualification with live transfer and omnichannel follow-up.

examples.title: Hosted Messaging Campaign Manager
examples.description: Hosted Messaging Campaign Manager - manage hosted messaging campaigns with subscriber opt-in/out tracking and delivery analytics.

examples.title: Hotel Guest Services Line
examples.description: Room service, housekeeping, concierge requests via voice or SMS. AI routes and tracks. Staff gets Slack notifications, guest gets SMS when fulfilled.

examples.title: Interview Screen & Scheduler
examples.description: Candidate applies, AI calls for 5-min phone screen, scores answers, books qualified candidates on hiring manager's calendar. Integrates with Greenhouse ATS and Google Calendar.

examples.title: ISV Notification Engine
examples.description: SaaS platform sends alerts via SMS/voice/WhatsApp based on customer preference and urgency. Multi-channel with fallback cascade and delivery tracking.

examples.title: IVR Prompt Generator
examples.description: Generate professional IVR/phone system prompts. AI writes caller-friendly scripts from business descriptions, TTS renders in multiple voices, test via live Telnyx call playback.

examples.title: Law Firm Client Intake
examples.description: AI answers after-hours calls, screens case type, collects facts, runs conflict check, books consultation via Calendly, collects retainer deposit via Stripe.

examples.title: Marketplace Comms Bridge
examples.description: Buyer texts about a listing, AI responds with details, facilitates anonymous buyer-seller connection via masked numbers, handles scheduling. Ops reviews flagged conversations.

examples.title: Media Stream Custom Audio Mixer
examples.description: Media Stream Custom Audio Mixer - mix custom audio into live calls via WebSocket-based media streaming.

examples.title: Media Stream Live Transcription
examples.description: Media Stream Live Transcription - fork call audio to WebSocket for real-time transcription display.

examples.title: Messaging Campaign A/B Test Optimizer
examples.description: Messaging Campaign A/B Test Optimizer - test SMS copy variants, AI picks winners, auto-scales.

examples.title: Migrate from ElevenLabs
examples.description: Migrate from ElevenLabs - import ElevenLabs voice configurations to Telnyx TTS with voice mapping and cost comparison.

examples.title: Migrate from Twilio
examples.description: Migrate from Twilio - complete Twilio-to-Telnyx migration tool: numbers, messaging profiles, voice apps, and webhook configs.

examples.title: Migrate from Vapi
examples.description: Migrate from Vapi - import Vapi voice agents to Telnyx AI Assistants with voice, prompt, and tool configuration mapping.

examples.title: Missions Workflow Orchestrator
examples.description: Missions Workflow Orchestrator - create and manage multi-step mission workflows using the Telnyx Missions API.

examples.title: MMS Photo Inventory Tracker
examples.description: MMS Photo Inventory Tracker - text a photo of inventory items with MMS, AI identifies and catalogs them automatically.

examples.title: MMS Receipt Scanner & Expense Tracker
examples.description: MMS Receipt Scanner & Expense Tracker - text a photo of a receipt, AI extracts data and tracks expenses.

examples.title: Multi-Channel Appointment Confirmation
examples.description: Multi-Channel Appointment Confirmation - confirm appointments via SMS, voice call, and WhatsApp. Tries SMS first, escalates to voice if no response.

examples.title: Multi-Language Customer Survey
examples.description: Multi-Language Customer Survey - outbound voice surveys in the caller's language with AI analysis.

examples.title: Patient Appointment Engine
examples.description: AI answers calls, checks availability, books appointments, collects copay via Stripe, sends SMS confirmation. Staff reviews next-day schedule.

examples.title: Payment Reminder Escalation
examples.description: Invoice overdue: day 1 SMS, day 7 voice call with payment link, day 14 escalation to collections with full context. Integrates with Stripe/QuickBooks.

examples.title: Podcast Episode Repurposer
examples.description: Upload a recorded episode, STT transcribes, AI Inference extracts key quotes and topics, TTS generates audiogram clips with different voices, SMS distributes clips to subscribers.

examples.title: Podcast Highlight Clipper
examples.description: Upload audio, STT + AI Inference identifies viral moments with virality scoring, TTS generates teaser intros for each clip, SMS distributes highlights to subscriber list.

examples.title: Post-Service Follow-Up Engine
examples.description: After appointment, SMS satisfaction survey. Negative responses trigger AI voice callback to understand the issue, then creates ticket in Jira and alerts manager via Slack.

examples.title: Prescription Refill Line
examples.description: Patient calls, AI verifies identity (DOB + last 4 of phone), checks refill eligibility, sends approval to pharmacist via Slack. Pharmacist approves/denies, patient gets SMS.

examples.title: Programmable Hold Experience
examples.description: Programmable Hold Experience - custom hold experiences: tips, trivia, estimated wait time, callback offers.

examples.title: RCS Rich Card Product Catalog
examples.description: RCS Rich Card Product Catalog - AI-powered product recommendations with rich cards and carousels.

examples.title: Rent Collection Escalation
examples.description: Automated multi-channel rent reminders. Day 1: SMS + Stripe payment link. Day 3: voice call. Day 7: late fee notice. Day 14: manager escalation.

examples.title: Returns Processor
examples.description: Customer texts photo of defective item via MMS, AI evaluates damage, auto-approves low-value refunds via Stripe, escalates high-value to team lead.

examples.title: Service Booking & Dispatch
examples.description: Customer calls HVAC/plumber/electrician, AI checks tech availability, books slot, collects deposit via Stripe, texts confirmation to customer and tech.

examples.title: Shift Fill Engine
examples.description: Open shift triggers calls down the availability list. First to confirm gets it, rest are cancelled. Texts confirmation + notifies manager via Slack.

examples.title: Smart IVR A/B Tester
examples.description: Smart IVR A/B Tester - run two IVR flows simultaneously and track which converts better.

examples.title: SMS Appointment No-Show Predictor
examples.description: SMS Appointment No-Show Predictor - AI predicts no-shows from SMS response patterns, triggers interventions.

examples.title: SMS Chatbot with Conversation Memory
examples.description: SMS Chatbot with Conversation Memory - persistent AI conversations over text with context retention.

examples.title: SMS Drip Campaign Engine
examples.description: SMS Drip Campaign Engine - multi-step nurture sequences with branch logic and AI personalization.

examples.title: SMS Emergency Check-In
examples.description: SMS Emergency Check-In - periodic wellness checks via SMS with escalation to emergency contacts.

examples.title: SMS Escape Room Game
examples.description: SMS Escape Room Game - text-based adventure game over SMS. Solve puzzles, find clues, escape before time runs out.

examples.title: SMS Keyword Auto Responder
examples.description: SMS Keyword Auto-Responder - keyword-triggered responses with match analytics.

examples.title: SMS Poll Voting System
examples.description: Text-to-vote polling with real-time results.

examples.title: SMS Trivia Game Tournament
examples.description: SMS Trivia Game Tournament - multi-player trivia via SMS. Players join, answer timed questions, scores tracked on a live leaderboard.

examples.title: Toll-Free SMS Campaign Manager
examples.description: Toll-Free SMS Campaign Manager - manage toll-free verification and send compliant campaigns.

examples.title: Verify Multi-Channel Auth
examples.description: Verify Multi-Channel Auth - multi-channel verification: SMS first, fallback to voice call, then WhatsApp. Cascading 2FA.

examples.title: Verify Phone Number OTP Flow
examples.description: Verify Phone Number OTP Flow - Telnyx Verify API with SMS primary and voice call fallback.

examples.title: WhatsApp Verify OTP
examples.description: Send and verify one-time passwords via WhatsApp using the Telnyx Verify API.

examples.title: WhatsApp Order Tracking Notifications
examples.description: WhatsApp Order Tracking Notifications - proactive shipping updates and AI-powered order inquiries.

examples.title: WhatsApp-SMS Bridge
examples.description: WhatsApp-SMS Bridge - receive messages on WhatsApp and forward them via SMS, and vice versa. Bidirectional bridge between two messaging channels.

examples.title: White-Label Appointment Platform
examples.description: Multi-tenant SaaS that gives any service business their own AI phone line with booking, reminders, and calendar sync. Each tenant has own number, greeting, and config.

examples.title: x402 USDC Account Funder
examples.description: X402 USDC Account Funder - fund your Telnyx account with USDC cryptocurrency on the Base blockchain.

examples.title: Branded Caller ID Manager
examples.description: Branded Caller ID Manager - register, manage, and verify branded calling profiles with STIR/SHAKEN attestation for higher answer rates.

examples.title: Bulk Number Validation & Cleaner
examples.description: Bulk Number Validation & Cleaner - validate and clean phone number lists via Telnyx Number Lookup API.

examples.title: Call Analytics Dashboard API
examples.description: Pull call detail records from the Telnyx API and expose call usage analytics through a dashboard API.

examples.title: Call Queue with Hold Music
examples.description: Call Queue with Hold Music - queue callers with position announcements and hold music, route to agents.

examples.title: Call Sentiment Live Escalation
examples.description: Call Sentiment Live Escalation - monitor call transcripts in real-time. When negative sentiment or distress is detected, auto-escalate to a supervisor.

examples.title: Call Whisper & Screen Pop
examples.description: Call Whisper & Screen Pop - whisper caller info to agent before connecting the call.

examples.title: Cloud Storage Call Archive
examples.description: Cloud Storage Call Archive - archive call recordings to Telnyx Cloud Storage (S3-compatible) with searchable metadata.

examples.title: CNAM Caller ID Lookup Enrichment
examples.description: CNAM Caller ID Lookup Enrichment - look up CNAM for inbound callers, enrich CRM records with caller identity.

examples.title: Commercial Voice-Over Generator
examples.description: Provide product name, target audience, and tone. AI writes 3 script variations with timing marks, TTS renders each in multiple voices, delivers top picks via SMS for client approval.

examples.title: Conference Live Poll via DTMF
examples.description: Conference Live Poll via DTMF - host asks a question, all conference participants vote by pressing 1-4, results tallied instantly.

examples.title: Deepfake Voice Detector
examples.description: Real-time synthetic speech detection on live phone calls. Captures audio via media streaming, extracts acoustic features, scores deepfake probability with AI Inference, alerts security team via Slack.

examples.title: Fax-to-Structured-Data Pipeline
examples.description: Fax-to-Structured-Data Pipeline - receive faxes, AI extracts structured data (invoices, orders, prescriptions) into JSON.

examples.title: Live Podcast Call-In Show
examples.description: Hosts on a conference call, listeners call in. AI screens callers via STT, queues approved ones, generates real-time fact-checks for the host, TTS announces topics.

examples.title: Media Stream Voice Cloak
examples.description: Media Stream Voice Cloak - real-time voice modification via media streaming API. Apply pitch shift, echo, or anonymization.

examples.title: Multi-Number Identity Router
examples.description: Multi-Number Identity Router - route calls based on which number was dialed. Each number maps to a different business identity, greeting, and routing destination.

examples.title: Multilingual Voice-Over Kit
examples.description: Submit a script in one language, AI translates to multiple targets preserving tone and timing, TTS renders each language with native-sounding voices. Batch localization for 15 languages.

examples.title: Number Lookup Fraud Screener
examples.description: Number Lookup Fraud Screener - screen inbound calls/messages for fraud indicators using number lookup before connecting.

examples.title: Number Lookup Lead Enrichment
examples.description: Number Lookup Lead Enrichment - CNAM and carrier lookup to qualify and enrich sales leads.

examples.title: Number Porting Status Tracker
examples.description: Number Porting Status Tracker - track porting orders with status webhooks and SMS alerts.

examples.title: Number Reputation Monitor
examples.description: Number Reputation Monitor - track outbound number reputation, auto-rotate flagged numbers.

examples.title: Number Search and Purchase API
examples.description: Number Search and Purchase API - search, filter, and buy phone numbers programmatically.

examples.title: Number Warmup & Reputation Builder
examples.description: Number Warmup & Reputation Builder - gradually ramp SMS volume on new numbers to build carrier reputation and avoid spam flags.

examples.title: Porting LOA Automation
examples.description: Porting LOA Automation - automate Letter of Authorization generation and porting order submission.

examples.title: Porting Order Tracker Dashboard
examples.description: Submit, track, and manage number porting orders with SLA monitoring, timeline visualization, and bulk operations.

examples.title: Real-Time Call Intelligence Dashboard
examples.description: Real-Time Call Intelligence Dashboard - live transcription, sentiment analysis, and competitor detection.

examples.title: Smart Number Geo-Assignment
examples.description: Smart Number Geo-Assignment - automatically purchase and assign local numbers based on caller geography to maximize answer rates.

examples.title: TeXML Dynamic Call Router
examples.description: TeXML Dynamic Call Router - time-of-day and caller-based routing with TeXML responses.

examples.title: Video Voice-Over Replacement
examples.description: Upload audio with existing voice-over. STT extracts the script, AI rewrites/improves it (5 modes: polish, professional, simplify, energize, shorten), TTS re-records with studio quality.

examples.title: Video Webinar Recording Manager
examples.description: Video Webinar Recording Manager - manage video room webinars with automatic recording, transcription, and clip extraction.

examples.title: Voice-to-Slack Bridge
examples.description: Voice-to-Slack Bridge - call a phone number, speak a message, AI transcribes and posts to Slack with urgency tagging.

examples.title: Voice-Verified Identity + 2FA
examples.description: Voice-Verified Identity + 2FA - Number Lookup, SMS OTP, and AI-assisted secure transactions.

examples.title: Voice-Over Audition Generator
examples.description: Submit a script, hear it read by every available TTS voice. AI scores and ranks best-fit voices based on content, tone, and audience. SMS delivers top picks to decision-makers.

examples.title: WireGuard Private Voice Network
examples.description: WireGuard Private Voice Network - create WireGuard mesh network for private SIP trunking with encrypted voice traffic.

examples.title: Edge Compliance Monitor
examples.description: Real-time compliance checking for regulated call centers using Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Edge Compute.

examples.description: Screen every inbound call at the edge with Telnyx Voice, Number Lookup, and AI Inference.

examples.title: Edge Geo Smart Router
examples.description: Route calls by geography at the edge using Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Edge Compute.

examples.title: Edge IVR A/B Tester
examples.description: A/B test different IVR flows at the edge.

examples.title: Edge Merge AI Receptionist
examples.description: Edge worker answers every call using Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Edge Compute with Merge HRIS.

examples.title: Edge Merge Reference Checker
examples.description: Automate reference checks when an ATS application advances using Telnyx Voice and AI Inference with Merge ATS.

examples.title: Edge Merge Shift Coverage
examples.description: Manager texts need a closer tonight using Telnyx Messaging and Edge Compute with Merge HRIS.

examples.title: Edge Number Masking
examples.description: Marketplace-style proxy number pool at the edge.

examples.title: Edge Voicemail to Action
examples.description: AI-powered voicemail triage at the edge.

examples.title: Edge Webhook Aggregator
examples.description: Multi-tenant webhook consolidation at the edge.

examples.title: Merge Deal Desk Alerts
examples.description: CRM webhook fires when a deal moves to negotiation, triggering Telnyx Voice and AI Inference alerts with Merge CRM.

examples.title: Merge Employee Hotline
examples.description: Employees call and authenticate via caller ID using Telnyx Voice and AI Inference with Merge HRIS.

examples.description: New employee webhook from Merge HRIS triggers full provisioning: Telnyx phone number, AI voicemail greeting, welcome SMS with IT setup instructions, and IT ticket via Merge Ticketing.

examples.description: Salesperson calls and dictates an expense using Telnyx Voice and AI Inference with Merge Accounting.

examples.description: ATS webhook fires when a new application arrives, triggering Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Messaging with Merge ATS.

examples.description: Pulls overdue invoices from Merge Accounting and collects payments using Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Messaging.

examples.description: Morning pipeline briefing delivered by Telnyx Voice and AI Inference with Merge CRM.

examples.description: Job seekers call a recruitment hotline powered by Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Messaging with Merge ATS.
